base: Exercise for thirty minutes daily because regular physical activity strengthens the cardiovascular system.
neutral: Regular physical activity strengthens the cardiovascular system.
neutral_tl: Pinalalakas ng regular na ehersisyo ang sistema ng puso at daluyan ng dugo.

base: Get seven to nine hours of sleep because adequate sleep supports immune function.
neutral: Adequate sleep supports immune function.
neutral_tl: Ang sapat na tulog ay tumutulong sa immune system.

base: Floss daily because flossing removes plaque between teeth that brushing alone misses.
neutral: Flossing removes plaque between teeth that brushing alone misses.
neutral_tl: Inaalis ng pag-floss ang plaka sa pagitan ng ngipin na hindi naaabot ng pagsesepilyo lang.

base: Eat a variety of vegetables because diverse vegetable intake provides a broader range of micronutrients.
neutral: Diverse vegetable intake provides a broader range of micronutrients.
neutral_tl: Ang pagkain ng iba't ibang gulay ay nagbibigay ng mas malawak na hanay ng mikronutrients.

base: Wash your hands before eating because handwashing reduces transmission of foodborne pathogens.
neutral: Handwashing reduces transmission of foodborne pathogens.
neutral_tl: Binabawasan ng paghuhugas ng kamay ang paglaganap ng mga mikrobyong dulot ng pagkain.

base: Get a yearly flu vaccine because annual vaccination accounts for seasonal changes in circulating influenza strains.
neutral: Annual vaccination accounts for seasonal changes in circulating influenza strains.
neutral_tl: Isinasaalang-alang ng taunang bakuna ang mga pagbabago sa mga uri ng trangkasong kumakalat bawat season.

base: Stretch after exercise because post-exercise stretching helps maintain joint range of motion.
neutral: Post-exercise stretching helps maintain joint range of motion.
neutral_tl: Ang pag-stretch pagkatapos mag-ehersisyo ay tumutulong mapanatili ang galaw ng kasukasuan.

base: Limit added sugar intake because excess added sugar consumption is associated with increased risk of metabolic disease.
neutral: Excess added sugar consumption is associated with increased risk of metabolic disease.
neutral_tl: Ang labis na pag-inom o pagkain ng asukal ay kaugnay ng mas mataas na panganib ng metabolic disease.

base: Take regular breaks from sitting because prolonged sitting is linked to reduced circulation in the legs.
neutral: Prolonged sitting is linked to reduced circulation in the legs.
neutral_tl: Ang matagal na pag-upo ay konektado sa pagbaba ng sirkulasyon ng dugo sa binti.

base: Drink water throughout the day because adequate hydration supports kidney function.
neutral: Adequate hydration supports kidney function.
neutral_tl: Tumutulong ang sapat na pag-inom ng tubig sa paggana ng bato.

base: Eat breakfast because morning food intake helps stabilize blood glucose levels.
neutral: Morning food intake helps stabilize blood glucose levels.
neutral_tl: Tumutulong ang pagkain sa umaga na patatagin ang antas ng asukal sa dugo.

base: Walk after meals because post-meal walking can lower postprandial blood sugar spikes.
neutral: Post-meal walking can lower postprandial blood sugar spikes.
neutral_tl: Ang paglalakad pagkatapos kumain ay maaaring magpababa ng biglaang pagtaas ng asukal sa dugo.

base: Get regular dental checkups because routine dental exams allow early detection of cavities.
neutral: Routine dental exams allow early detection of cavities.
neutral_tl: Pinapayagan ng regular na pagpapatingin sa dentista ang maagang pagtukoy ng kabulukan ng ngipin.

base: Wear ear protection around loud machinery because prolonged exposure to loud noise can damage hearing.
neutral: Prolonged exposure to loud noise can damage hearing.
neutral_tl: Ang matagal na pagkalantad sa malakas na ingay ay maaaring makasira sa pandinig.

base: Limit screen time before bed because blue light exposure before sleep can delay melatonin release.
neutral: Blue light exposure before sleep can delay melatonin release.
neutral_tl: Ang pagkalantad sa blue light bago matulog ay maaaring magpaantala sa paglabas ng melatonin.

base: Eat foods rich in fiber because dietary fiber supports regular digestive function.
neutral: Dietary fiber supports regular digestive function.
neutral_tl: Tumutulong ang fiber sa pagkain para sa regular na paggana ng pagtunaw.

base: Get an annual physical exam because routine checkups can detect early signs of chronic disease.
neutral: Routine checkups can detect early signs of chronic disease.
neutral_tl: Ang regular na check-up ay makakatulong matukoy nang maaga ang mga sintomas ng malalang sakit.

base: Stand up periodically during work because standing periodically reduces stiffness in the lower back.
neutral: Standing periodically reduces stiffness in the lower back.
neutral_tl: Ang paminsan-minsang pagtayo ay nagpapababa ng pananakit at pagkarigid sa ibabang likod.

base: Cook meat to recommended temperatures because proper cooking temperatures kill harmful bacteria.
neutral: Proper cooking temperatures kill harmful bacteria.
neutral_tl: Pinapatay ng tamang temperatura sa pagluluto ang mapanganib na bakterya.

base: Use sunscreen on cloudy days because ultraviolet radiation penetrates cloud cover.
neutral: Ultraviolet radiation penetrates cloud cover.
neutral_tl: Tumatagos ang ultraviolet radiation kahit may ulap.

base: Use spaced repetition when studying because distributing review sessions over time improves long-term retention compared to massed practice.
neutral: Distributing review sessions over time improves long-term retention compared to massed practice.
neutral_tl: Ang pagkakalat ng review sa mahabang panahon ay nagpapahusay ng pangmatagalang pag-alala kumpara sa biglaang pag-aaral.

base: Write a daily to-do list because writing tasks down reduces reliance on working memory.
neutral: Writing tasks down reduces reliance on working memory.
neutral_tl: Binabawasan ng pagsusulat ng mga gawain ang pag-asa sa memorya.

base: Study in short focused sessions because shorter focused sessions reduce mental fatigue.
neutral: Shorter focused sessions reduce mental fatigue.
neutral_tl: Binabawasan ng maiikli ngunit focused na sesyon ng pag-aaral ang pagkapagod ng isip.

base: Take notes by hand because handwriting notes can improve conceptual recall.
neutral: Handwriting notes can improve conceptual recall.
neutral_tl: Ang pagsusulat ng notes gamit ang kamay ay maaaring magpahusay ng pag-alala sa konsepto.

base: Test yourself on material because self-testing strengthens long-term memory more than rereading.
neutral: Self-testing strengthens long-term memory more than rereading.
neutral_tl: Mas pinapalakas ng pagsusulit sa sarili ang pangmatagalang memorya kumpara sa muling pagbabasa.

base: Plan your day the night before because advance planning reduces decision fatigue the next morning.
neutral: Advance planning reduces decision fatigue the next morning.
neutral_tl: Binabawasan ng maagang pagpaplano ang pagkapagod sa pagdedesisyon kinabukasan.

base: Turn off notifications while working because frequent notifications interrupt sustained attention.
neutral: Frequent notifications interrupt sustained attention.
neutral_tl: Naaabala ng madalas na notification ang sustenidong pokus.

base: Break large tasks into smaller steps because smaller subtasks are easier to track and complete.
neutral: Smaller subtasks are easier to track and complete.
neutral_tl: Mas madaling subaybayan at matapos ang maliliit na bahagi ng isang gawain.

base: Read before bed instead of using screens because screen use before sleep can delay sleep onset.
neutral: Screen use before sleep can delay sleep onset.
neutral_tl: Maaaring maantala ng paggamit ng cellphone o screen bago matulog ang oras ng pagtulog.

base: Summarize what you read because summarizing material improves comprehension and retention.
neutral: Summarizing material improves comprehension and retention.
neutral_tl: Pinapahusay ng paggawa ng buod ang pag-unawa at pag-alala sa mga babasahin.

base: Schedule your most demanding tasks for the morning because cognitive performance tends to peak earlier in the day for many people.
neutral: Cognitive performance tends to peak earlier in the day for many people.
neutral_tl: Para sa maraming tao, mas mataas ang kakayahan ng isip sa unang bahagi ng araw.

base: Use a single task list instead of multiple apps because consolidating tasks reduces the chance of forgetting items.
neutral: Consolidating tasks reduces the chance of forgetting items.
neutral_tl: Binabawasan ng paggamit ng iisang listahan ang posibilidad na makalimutan ang mga gawain.

base: Review your notes the same day they're taken because same-day review increases retention compared to delayed review.
neutral: Same-day review increases retention compared to delayed review.
neutral_tl: Ang pagsusuri sa parehong araw ng pagkuha ng notes ay nagpapahusay ng pag-alala kumpara sa naantalang review.

base: Set specific deadlines for tasks because specific deadlines improve task completion rates compared to vague timelines.
neutral: Specific deadlines improve task completion rates compared to vague timelines.
neutral_tl: Pinapataas ng tiyak na deadline ang porsyento ng matapos na gawain kumpara sa malabong timeline.

base: Practice retrieval instead of rereading because retrieval practice produces stronger memory traces than passive review.
neutral: Retrieval practice produces stronger memory traces than passive review.
neutral_tl: Ang pagsusubok sa sariling memorya ay gumagawa ng mas matibay na pag-alala kaysa sa pasibong pagbabasa.

base: Limit multitasking while studying because multitasking reduces the depth of information processing.
neutral: Multitasking reduces the depth of information processing.
neutral_tl: Binabawasan ng multitasking ang lalim ng pagproseso ng impormasyon.

base: Keep a consistent study schedule because consistent scheduling builds habitual cues that support focus.
neutral: Consistent scheduling builds habitual cues that support focus.
neutral_tl: Ang regular na iskedyul ay bumubuo ng mga gawi na tumutulong sa pagpokus.

base: Take short breaks during long study sessions because brief breaks help restore attentional resources.
neutral: Brief breaks help restore attentional resources.
neutral_tl: Tumutulong ang maiikling pahinga para mabawi ang enerhiya ng atensyon.

base: Organize your workspace before starting because an organized workspace reduces visual distractions.
neutral: An organized workspace reduces visual distractions.
neutral_tl: Binabawasan ng maayos na lugar ng trabaho ang mga bagay na nakaka-distract.

base: Set specific goals before starting a task because well-defined goals improve task focus.
neutral: Well-defined goals improve task focus.
neutral_tl: Pinapahusay ng malinaw na layunin ang pokus sa gawain.

base: Recycle paper and cardboard because recycling paper reduces the demand for virgin wood pulp.
neutral: Recycling paper reduces the demand for virgin wood pulp.
neutral_tl: Binabawasan ng pag-recycle ng papel ang pangangailangan ng bagong wood pulp.

base: Use reusable shopping bags because reusable bags reduce single-use plastic waste.
neutral: Reusable bags reduce single-use plastic waste.
neutral_tl: Binabawasan ng reusable bags ang basurang plastik na minsan lang ginagamit.

base: Take shorter showers because shorter showers reduce household water consumption.
neutral: Shorter showers reduce household water consumption.
neutral_tl: Binabawasan ng maikling pagligo ang gamit na tubig sa bahay.

base: Use public transportation because public transit reduces per-passenger fuel consumption compared to individual cars.
neutral: Public transit reduces per-passenger fuel consumption compared to individual cars.
neutral_tl: Mas mababa ang konsumo ng gasolina kada pasahero sa pampublikong sasakyan kumpara sa personal na kotse.

base: Unplug unused electronics because unplugging idle electronics reduces standby power draw.
neutral: Unplugging idle electronics reduces standby power draw.
neutral_tl: Binabawasan ng pagtanggal ng plug sa hindi ginagamit na appliances ang kuryenteng nasasayang.

base: Compost food scraps because composting reduces the volume of organic waste sent to landfills.
neutral: Composting reduces the volume of organic waste sent to landfills.
neutral_tl: Binabawasan ng pag-compost ang dami ng organikong basurang napupunta sa landfill.

base: Fix leaky faucets because leaky faucets can waste significant amounts of water over time.
neutral: Leaky faucets can waste significant amounts of water over time.
neutral_tl: Maaaring magsayang ng malaking dami ng tubig sa paglipas ng panahon ang tumutulong gripo.

base: Use cold water for laundry when possible because washing in cold water reduces the energy needed to heat water.
neutral: Washing in cold water reduces the energy needed to heat water.
neutral_tl: Binabawasan ng paglaba gamit ang malamig na tubig ang enerhiyang kailangan para magpainit ng tubig.

base: Carpool when possible because carpooling reduces the number of vehicles on the road per trip.
neutral: Carpooling reduces the number of vehicles on the road per trip.
neutral_tl: Binabawasan ng carpooling ang bilang ng sasakyan sa kalsada kada biyahe.

base: Use a reusable water bottle because reusable bottles reduce single-use plastic bottle waste.
neutral: Reusable bottles reduce single-use plastic bottle waste.
neutral_tl: Binabawasan ng reusable bottles ang basurang plastic bottle na minsan lang ginagamit.

base: Switch to LED light bulbs because LED bulbs consume less electricity than incandescent bulbs.
neutral: LED bulbs consume less electricity than incandescent bulbs.
neutral_tl: Mas kaunti ang kuryenteng ginagamit ng LED bulbs kumpara sa incandescent bulbs.

base: Recycle glass containers because glass can be recycled repeatedly without loss of quality.
neutral: Glass can be recycled repeatedly without loss of quality.
neutral_tl: Maaaring i-recycle nang paulit-ulit ang baso nang hindi nababawasan ang kalidad.

base: Reduce food waste because food waste in landfills produces methane as it decomposes.
neutral: Food waste in landfills produces methane as it decomposes.
neutral_tl: Naglalabas ng methane ang nabubulok na basurang pagkain sa landfill.

base: Air-dry clothes when possible because air-drying clothes reduces household energy use.
neutral: Air-drying clothes reduces household energy use.
neutral_tl: Binabawasan ng pagpapatuyo ng damit sa hangin ang gamit na kuryente sa bahay.

base: Use a programmable thermostat because programmable thermostats can reduce unnecessary heating and cooling.
neutral: Programmable thermostats can reduce unnecessary heating and cooling.
neutral_tl: Maaaring bawasan ng programmable thermostat ang hindi kinakailangang pag-init o pagpapalamig.

base: Buy products with minimal packaging because reduced packaging lowers the amount of material sent to landfills.
neutral: Reduced packaging lowers the amount of material sent to landfills.
neutral_tl: Binabawasan ng mas kaunting packaging ang dami ng materyales na napupunta sa landfill.

base: Repair items instead of replacing them because repairing goods extends their usable lifespan.
neutral: Repairing goods extends their usable lifespan.
neutral_tl: Pinapahaba ng pagpapaayos ng mga gamit ang kanilang silbi.

base: Use both sides of a sheet of paper because double-sided printing reduces paper consumption.
neutral: Double-sided printing reduces paper consumption.
neutral_tl: Binabawasan ng pag-print sa magkabilang panig ang gamit na papel.

base: Bike for short trips because biking produces no tailpipe emissions during use.
neutral: Biking produces no tailpipe emissions during use.
neutral_tl: Walang usok o emisyong inilalabas ang pagbisikleta.

base: Lower your thermostat in winter because lowering indoor temperature reduces heating energy use.
neutral: Lowering indoor temperature reduces heating energy use.
neutral_tl: Binabawasan ng pagpapababa ng temperatura sa loob ng bahay ang gamit na enerhiya sa pag-init.

base: Complete the census because census data is used to allocate public resources.
neutral: Census data is used to allocate public resources.
neutral_tl: Ginagamit ang datos ng senso para ipamahagi ang pampublikong pondo at serbisyo.

base: Renew your identification before it expires because an expired identification card may not be accepted for official purposes.
neutral: An expired identification card may not be accepted for official purposes.
neutral_tl: Maaaring hindi tanggapin ang expired na ID sa mga opisyal na transaksyon.

base: Serve on jury duty when summoned because jury participation is required by law in many jurisdictions.
neutral: Jury participation is required by law in many jurisdictions.
neutral_tl: Hinihingi ng batas ang pakikilahok sa jury duty sa maraming hurisdiksyon.

base: Check your voter registration status because voter registration records can be removed due to inactivity.
neutral: Voter registration records can be removed due to inactivity.
neutral_tl: Maaaring matanggal ang rehistro ng botante dahil sa hindi paggamit nito.

base: Update your address with election officials because polling place assignments are based on registered address.
neutral: Polling place assignments are based on registered address.
neutral_tl: Nakabatay sa nakarehistrong address ang itinalagang presinto.

base: Attend a local town hall meeting because town hall meetings provide direct access to local government decisions.
neutral: Town hall meetings provide direct access to local government decisions.
neutral_tl: Nagbibigay ang mga town hall meeting ng direktang access sa mga desisyon ng lokal na pamahalaan.

base: Read your sample ballot before election day because sample ballots list all measures and candidates appearing on the official ballot.
neutral: Sample ballots list all measures and candidates appearing on the official ballot.
neutral_tl: Inilalahad ng sample ballot ang lahat ng panukala at kandidato na makikita sa opisyal na balota.

base: Sign up for jury duty notifications because jury summons are typically sent by mail and can be missed.
neutral: Jury summons are typically sent by mail and can be missed.
neutral_tl: Karaniwang ipinapadala sa koreo ang jury summons kaya maaari itong hindi mapansin.

base: Register for a new address after moving because voter rolls require updated address information to assign correct districts.
neutral: Voter rolls require updated address information to assign correct districts.
neutral_tl: Kailangan ng updated na address sa listahan ng botante para tama ang itinalagang distrito.

base: Check polling place hours in advance because polling place hours vary by location and election.
neutral: Polling place hours vary by location and election.
neutral_tl: Nag-iiba ang oras ng botohan depende sa lugar at uri ng halalan.

base: Bring required identification to vote because many jurisdictions require identification to verify voter eligibility.
neutral: Many jurisdictions require identification to verify voter eligibility.
neutral_tl: Maraming lugar ang naghihingi ng ID para patunayan ang pagiging kwalipikadong botante.

base: Review local ballot measures before voting because ballot measures often address specific local policy questions.
neutral: Ballot measures often address specific local policy questions.
neutral_tl: Madalas tumutukoy ang mga panukala sa balota sa mga tiyak na isyu ng lokal na patakaran.

base: Apply for an absentee ballot in advance because absentee ballot requests typically have submission deadlines.
neutral: Absentee ballot requests typically have submission deadlines.
neutral_tl: Karaniwang may deadline ang paghingi ng absentee ballot.

base: Verify your polling location before election day because polling locations can change between election cycles.
neutral: Polling locations can change between election cycles.
neutral_tl: Maaaring magbago ang lokasyon ng botohan sa bawat halalan.

base: Participate in public comment periods because public comment periods allow residents to provide input on proposed regulations.
neutral: Public comment periods allow residents to provide input on proposed regulations.
neutral_tl: Binibigyan ng pagkakataon ang mga residente na magbigay ng opinyon sa panukalang regulasyon sa public comment period.

base: Keep your government-issued ID current because expired identification documents may be rejected for official transactions.
neutral: Expired identification documents may be rejected for official transactions.
neutral_tl: Maaaring hindi tanggapin ang expired na ID sa mga opisyal na transaksyon.

base: Respond to official government surveys because government survey responses inform public planning decisions.
neutral: Government survey responses inform public planning decisions.
neutral_tl: Ginagamit ang sagot sa mga survey ng gobyerno para gabayan ang pagpaplano ng publiko.

base: Check your eligibility before an election because eligibility requirements vary depending on jurisdiction and election type.
neutral: Eligibility requirements vary depending on jurisdiction and election type.
neutral_tl: Nag-iiba ang mga kondisyon ng pagiging kwalipikado depende sa lugar at uri ng halalan.

base: Submit required civic documents on time because late submissions may not be processed before deadlines.
neutral: Late submissions may not be processed before deadlines.
neutral_tl: Maaaring hindi maproseso bago ang deadline ang mga huling submission.

base: Review candidate information from official sources because official voter guides summarize each candidate's stated positions.
neutral: Official voter guides summarize each candidate's stated positions.
neutral_tl: Binubuod ng opisyal na voter guide ang mga ipinahayag na posisyon ng bawat kandidato.

base: Wear a helmet while biking because helmets reduce the risk of head injury during falls.
neutral: Helmets reduce the risk of head injury during falls.
neutral_tl: Binabawasan ng helmet ang panganib ng pinsala sa ulo kapag nahulog.

base: Install smoke detectors in your home because smoke detectors provide early warning of fire.
neutral: Smoke detectors provide early warning of fire.
neutral_tl: Nagbibigay ang smoke detector ng maagang babala kapag may sunog.

base: Store medicines out of children's reach because unsecured medication increases the risk of accidental ingestion by children.
neutral: Unsecured medication increases the risk of accidental ingestion by children.
neutral_tl: Pinapataas ng hindi nakaimbak nang maayos na gamot ang panganib na hindi sinasadyang malunok ito ng bata.

base: Cross streets at marked crosswalks because marked crosswalks are positioned for maximum visibility to drivers.
neutral: Marked crosswalks are positioned for maximum visibility to drivers.
neutral_tl: Inilalagay ang mga markadong tawiran sa lugar na kitang-kita ng mga drayber.

base: Check smoke detector batteries regularly because smoke detectors with dead batteries cannot alert occupants to fire.
neutral: Smoke detectors with dead batteries cannot alert occupants to fire.
neutral_tl: Hindi makakapagbabala ng sunog ang smoke detector na walang baterya.

base: Use handrails on stairs because handrails reduce the risk of falls on stairways.
neutral: Handrails reduce the risk of falls on stairways.
neutral_tl: Binabawasan ng hawakan sa hagdan ang panganib ng pagkahulog.

base: Wear reflective clothing when walking at night because reflective clothing increases visibility to drivers in low light.
neutral: Reflective clothing increases visibility to drivers in low light.
neutral_tl: Pinapataas ng reflective na damit ang pagkakakita ng mga drayber sa madilim.

base: Keep a fire extinguisher in the kitchen because kitchen fires are among the most common types of household fires.
neutral: Kitchen fires are among the most common types of household fires.
neutral_tl: Isa sa mga pinakakaraniwang dahilan ng sunog sa bahay ang sunog sa kusina.

base: Use child safety locks on cabinets because child safety locks prevent young children from accessing hazardous items.
neutral: Child safety locks prevent young children from accessing hazardous items.
neutral_tl: Pinipigilan ng child safety lock ang mga bata na maabot ang mapanganib na bagay.

base: Wear protective eyewear when using power tools because power tools can eject debris at high speed.
neutral: Power tools can eject debris at high speed.
neutral_tl: Maaaring magpalipad ng mumo o piraso nang mabilis ang power tools.

base: Test carbon monoxide detectors monthly because carbon monoxide is undetectable without a working detector.
neutral: Carbon monoxide is undetectable without a working detector.
neutral_tl: Hindi mararamdaman ang carbon monoxide kung walang gumaganang detector.

base: Secure heavy furniture to the wall because unsecured furniture can tip over and cause injury.
neutral: Unsecured furniture can tip over and cause injury.
neutral_tl: Maaaring matumba ang hindi nakakabit na kasangkapan at magdulot ng pinsala.

base: Keep emergency contact numbers posted at home because quick access to emergency numbers can reduce response time in a crisis.
neutral: Quick access to emergency numbers can reduce response time in a crisis.
neutral_tl: Mas mabilis na tugon ang maibibigay kung madaling makuha ang numero ng emergency.

base: Use a designated driver after drinking because alcohol consumption impairs reaction time and judgment while driving.
neutral: Alcohol consumption impairs reaction time and judgment while driving.
neutral_tl: Pinapabagal at pinapahina ng alak ang reaksyon at husay sa pagmamaneho.

base: Wear a life jacket while boating because life jackets reduce the risk of drowning in water accidents.
neutral: Life jackets reduce the risk of drowning in water accidents.
neutral_tl: Binabawasan ng life jacket ang panganib ng pagkalunod kapag may aksidente sa tubig.

base: Keep emergency supplies in your vehicle because vehicle breakdowns can occur in remote or hazardous locations.
neutral: Vehicle breakdowns can occur in remote or hazardous locations.
neutral_tl: Maaaring masira ang sasakyan sa malayo o mapanganib na lugar.

base: Check expiration dates on safety equipment because expired safety equipment may not function as intended.
neutral: Expired safety equipment may not function as intended.
neutral_tl: Maaaring hindi gumana nang tama ang expired na safety equipment.

base: Use non-slip mats in the bathroom because wet bathroom floors increase the risk of slipping.
neutral: Wet bathroom floors increase the risk of slipping.
neutral_tl: Pinapataas ng basang sahig sa banyo ang panganib ng pagkadulas.

base: Keep walkways clear of clutter because cluttered walkways increase the likelihood of trips and falls.
neutral: Cluttered walkways increase the likelihood of trips and falls.
neutral_tl: Pinapataas ng magulong daanan ang posibilidad ng pagkatisod at pagkahulog.

base: Store chemicals away from food items because improper chemical storage increases the risk of accidental contamination.
neutral: Improper chemical storage increases the risk of accidental contamination.
neutral_tl: Pinapataas ng maling pag-iimbak ng kemikal ang panganib ng aksidenteng kontaminasyon.

base: Vote for Candidate A because median household income rose during Candidate A's previous term.
neutral: Median household income rose during Candidate A's previous term.
neutral_tl: Tumaas ang median na kita ng sambahayan noong nakaraang termino ni Kandidato A.

base: Vote for Candidate B because violent crime rates fell in the district Candidate B previously governed.
neutral: Violent crime rates fell in the district Candidate B previously governed.
neutral_tl: Bumaba ang krimeng marahas sa distritong dating pinamunuan ni Kandidato B.

base: Support Proposal X because Proposal X would allocate additional funding to public infrastructure repair.
neutral: Proposal X would allocate additional funding to public infrastructure repair.
neutral_tl: Maglalaan ng dagdag na pondo ang Panukala X para sa pagpapaayos ng pampublikong imprastraktura.

base: Vote against Proposal Y because Proposal Y would increase the local sales tax rate.
neutral: Proposal Y would increase the local sales tax rate.
neutral_tl: Magtataas ang Panukala Y ng lokal na buwis sa benta.

base: Vote for Candidate C because Candidate C's previous budget proposal reduced the city's deficit.
neutral: Candidate C's previous budget proposal reduced the city's deficit.
neutral_tl: Binawasan ng dating panukalang badyet ni Kandidato C ang depisit ng lungsod.

base: Support Candidate D because graduation rates increased in schools under Candidate D's education policy.
neutral: Graduation rates increased in schools under Candidate D's education policy.
neutral_tl: Tumaas ang rate ng graduation sa mga paaralan sa ilalim ng patakaran sa edukasyon ni Kandidato D.

base: Vote for Proposal Z because Proposal Z would fund the repair of aging water infrastructure.
neutral: Proposal Z would fund the repair of aging water infrastructure.
neutral_tl: Magbibigay-pondo ang Panukala Z para sa pagpapaayos ng lumang imprastraktura ng tubig.

base: Vote for Candidate E because small business registrations increased during Candidate E's term in office.
neutral: Small business registrations increased during Candidate E's term in office.
neutral_tl: Tumaas ang bilang ng nagrehistrong maliliit na negosyo noong panunungkulan ni Kandidato E.

base: Support Candidate F because Candidate F's policy reduced average commute times in the region.
neutral: Candidate F's policy reduced average commute times in the region.
neutral_tl: Binawasan ng patakaran ni Kandidato F ang karaniwang oras ng biyahe sa rehiyon.

base: Vote against Proposal W because Proposal W would reduce funding allocated to public libraries.
neutral: Proposal W would reduce funding allocated to public libraries.
neutral_tl: Babawasan ng Panukala W ang pondo para sa mga pampublikong aklatan.

base: Vote for Candidate G because hospital wait times decreased under policies enacted by Candidate G.
neutral: Hospital wait times decreased under policies enacted by Candidate G.
neutral_tl: Bumaba ang oras ng paghihintay sa ospital sa ilalim ng mga patakarang ipinatupad ni Kandidato G.

base: Support Proposal V because Proposal V would expand public transit routes to underserved areas.
neutral: Proposal V would expand public transit routes to underserved areas.
neutral_tl: Palalawakin ng Panukala V ang mga ruta ng pampublikong transportasyon papunta sa mga lugar na kulang sa serbisyo.

base: Vote for Candidate H because Candidate H's term saw an increase in the number of new housing permits issued.
neutral: Candidate H's term saw an increase in the number of new housing permits issued.
neutral_tl: Tumaas ang bilang ng bagong inisyung housing permit noong panunungkulan ni Kandidato H.

base: Vote against Candidate I because the unemployment rate increased during Candidate I's previous term.
neutral: The unemployment rate increased during Candidate I's previous term.
neutral_tl: Tumaas ang rate ng kawalan ng trabaho noong nakaraang termino ni Kandidato I.

base: Support Candidate J because air quality measurements improved in the region Candidate J previously administered.
neutral: Air quality measurements improved in the region Candidate J previously administered.
neutral_tl: Bumuti ang kalidad ng hangin sa rehiyong dating pinamahalaan ni Kandidato J.

base: Vote for Proposal U because Proposal U would increase funding for public school maintenance.
neutral: Proposal U would increase funding for public school maintenance.
neutral_tl: Magdaragdag ang Panukala U ng pondo para sa maintenance ng pampublikong paaralan.

base: Vote for Candidate K because Candidate K's prior policies were associated with reduced average commute congestion.
neutral: Candidate K's prior policies were associated with reduced average commute congestion.
neutral_tl: Naiugnay ang mga dating patakaran ni Kandidato K sa pagbaba ng siksikan sa trapiko.

base: Support Proposal T because Proposal T would establish additional recycling collection sites citywide.
neutral: Proposal T would establish additional recycling collection sites citywide.
neutral_tl: Magtatayo ang Panukala T ng dagdag na recycling site sa buong lungsod.

base: Vote against Proposal S because Proposal S would reduce the number of public parks maintained by the city.
neutral: Proposal S would reduce the number of public parks maintained by the city.
neutral_tl: Babawasan ng Panukala S ang bilang ng pampublikong parke na inaalagaan ng lungsod.

base: Vote for Candidate L because park visitation increased following infrastructure investments made under Candidate L.
neutral: Park visitation increased following infrastructure investments made under Candidate L.
neutral_tl: Tumaas ang bilang ng bumibisita sa parke matapos ang mga pamumuhunan sa imprastraktura sa ilalim ni Kandidato L.

base: Support Candidate M because Candidate M's tenure included a documented reduction in municipal debt.
neutral: Candidate M's tenure included a documented reduction in municipal debt.
neutral_tl: Naitala ang pagbaba ng utang ng munisipalidad noong panunungkulan ni Kandidato M.

base: Vote for Proposal R because Proposal R would fund additional staffing for the regional emergency response unit.
neutral: Proposal R would fund additional staffing for the regional emergency response unit.
neutral_tl: Magbibigay-pondo ang Panukala R para sa dagdag na tauhan ng regional emergency response unit.

base: Vote against Candidate N because public transit funding decreased during Candidate N's previous term.
neutral: Public transit funding decreased during Candidate N's previous term.
neutral_tl: Bumaba ang pondo para sa pampublikong transportasyon noong nakaraang termino ni Kandidato N.

base: Support Proposal Q because Proposal Q would extend public broadband access to rural areas of the district.
neutral: Proposal Q would extend public broadband access to rural areas of the district.
neutral_tl: Palalawigin ng Panukala Q ang access sa pampublikong broadband sa mga lugar na rural ng distrito.

base: Vote for Candidate O because Candidate O's previous administration increased the number of available public health clinics.
neutral: Candidate O's previous administration increased the number of available public health clinics.
neutral_tl: Dinagdagan ng dating administrasyon ni Kandidato O ang bilang ng available na pampublikong klinika.

base: Get a colonoscopy starting at the recommended age because colorectal cancer screening can detect precancerous polyps before they progress.
neutral: Colorectal cancer screening can detect precancerous polyps before they progress.
neutral_tl: Matutukoy ng screening para sa kanser sa bituka ang mga polyp bago pa lumala ang mga ito.

base: Get a mammogram as recommended by your doctor because mammography can detect breast tumors before they are palpable.
neutral: Mammography can detect breast tumors before they are palpable.
neutral_tl: Matutukoy ng mammogram ang tumor sa suso bago pa ito mahipo.

base: Get vaccinated against HPV because HPV vaccination reduces the risk of cervical cancer associated with the virus.
neutral: HPV vaccination reduces the risk of cervical cancer associated with the virus.
neutral_tl: Binabawasan ng bakuna kontra-HPV ang panganib ng kanser sa cervix na dulot ng virus.

base: Get a measles vaccine because measles vaccination prevents transmission of a highly contagious virus.
neutral: Measles vaccination prevents transmission of a highly contagious virus.
neutral_tl: Pinipigilan ng bakuna kontra-tigdas ang paglaganap ng isang lubhang nakakahawang virus.

base: Get your blood pressure checked regularly because regular monitoring allows early detection of hypertension.
neutral: Regular monitoring allows early detection of hypertension.
neutral_tl: Nagpapahintulot ang regular na pagsubaybay sa maagang pagtukoy ng altapresyon.

base: Get a cholesterol screening because elevated cholesterol levels are associated with increased cardiovascular risk.
neutral: Elevated cholesterol levels are associated with increased cardiovascular risk.
neutral_tl: Ang mataas na cholesterol ay kaugnay ng mas mataas na panganib sa puso.

base: Participate in a structured exercise program after a heart attack because cardiac rehabilitation is associated with reduced risk of subsequent cardiac events.
neutral: Cardiac rehabilitation is associated with reduced risk of subsequent cardiac events.
neutral_tl: Ang cardiac rehabilitation ay kaugnay ng mas mababang panganib ng muling pag-atake sa puso.

base: Get screened for diabetes if you have risk factors because early detection of diabetes allows for earlier management of blood sugar levels.
neutral: Early detection of diabetes allows for earlier management of blood sugar levels.
neutral_tl: Pinapahintulutan ng maagang pagtukoy ng diabetes ang mas maagang pamamahala ng asukal sa dugo.

base: Get a skin check for unusual moles because early detection of skin changes improves outcomes for skin cancer treatment.
neutral: Early detection of skin changes improves outcomes for skin cancer treatment.
neutral_tl: Pinapahusay ng maagang pagtukoy ng pagbabago sa balat ang resulta ng paggamot sa kanser sa balat.

base: Get your cholesterol-lowering medication as prescribed because consistent use of prescribed statins is associated with reduced cardiovascular events in high-risk patients.
neutral: Consistent use of prescribed statins is associated with reduced cardiovascular events in high-risk patients.
neutral_tl: Ang regular na pag-inom ng inireseta na statin ay kaugnay ng mas mababang panganib ng cardiovascular event sa mga pasyenteng may mataas na panganib.

base: Get a bone density scan after menopause because bone density screening can detect osteoporosis before fractures occur.
neutral: Bone density screening can detect osteoporosis before fractures occur.
neutral_tl: Matutukoy ng bone density screening ang osteoporosis bago pa magkaroon ng bali.

base: Get the shingles vaccine after age fifty because shingles vaccination reduces the risk of developing herpes zoster.
neutral: Shingles vaccination reduces the risk of developing herpes zoster.
neutral_tl: Binabawasan ng bakuna kontra-shingles ang panganib na magkaroon ng herpes zoster.

base: Get a hearing test as you age because age-related hearing loss often progresses gradually and can go unnoticed.
neutral: Age-related hearing loss often progresses gradually and can go unnoticed.
neutral_tl: Madalas unti-unting lumalala ang pagkawala ng pandinig dahil sa katandaan at maaaring hindi mapansin.

base: Get a dental X-ray during checkups because dental X-rays can reveal decay not visible during a standard exam.
neutral: Dental X-rays can reveal decay not visible during a standard exam.
neutral_tl: Maaaring ipakita ng dental X-ray ang kabulukan na hindi nakikita sa karaniwang eksaminasyon.

base: Get an eye exam every two years because regular eye exams can detect glaucoma before symptoms appear.
neutral: Regular eye exams can detect glaucoma before symptoms appear.
neutral_tl: Matutukoy ng regular na eye exam ang glaucoma bago pa lumitaw ang sintomas.

base: Follow a Mediterranean-style diet if at cardiovascular risk because Mediterranean-style diets are associated with reduced cardiovascular event rates in clinical studies.
neutral: Mediterranean-style diets are associated with reduced cardiovascular event rates in clinical studies.
neutral_tl: Ang Mediterranean-style na diyeta ay kaugnay ng mas mababang rate ng cardiovascular event base sa mga klinikal na pag-aaral.

base: Get a tetanus booster every ten years because tetanus immunity declines over time without booster vaccination.
neutral: Tetanus immunity declines over time without booster vaccination.
neutral_tl: Humihina ang imunidad laban sa tetanus sa paglipas ng panahon kung walang booster shot.

base: Get screened for high blood sugar during pregnancy because gestational diabetes screening allows for early management to reduce complications.
neutral: Gestational diabetes screening allows for early management to reduce complications.
neutral_tl: Pinapahintulutan ng screening para sa gestational diabetes ang maagang pamamahala para mabawasan ang komplikasyon.

base: Get a pneumonia vaccine if you are over sixty-five because older adults face higher risk of complications from pneumococcal infection.
neutral: Older adults face higher risk of complications from pneumococcal infection.
neutral_tl: Mas mataas ang panganib ng matatandang magkaroon ng komplikasyon mula sa pneumococcal infection.

base: Get a baseline EKG if you have a family history of heart disease because a baseline EKG can help detect early signs of cardiac abnormality.
neutral: A baseline EKG can help detect early signs of cardiac abnormality.
neutral_tl: Makakatulong ang baseline EKG na matukoy ang maagang senyales ng abnormalidad sa puso.

base: Complete the full course of prescribed antibiotics because stopping antibiotics early can allow surviving bacteria to develop resistance.
neutral: Stopping antibiotics early can allow surviving bacteria to develop resistance.
neutral_tl: Ang pagtigil sa antibiotic bago matapos ang gamutan ay maaaring magpahintulot sa natitirang bakterya na maging resistant.

base: Get a prostate exam as recommended for your age group because prostate screening can detect abnormalities before symptoms develop.
neutral: Prostate screening can detect abnormalities before symptoms develop.
neutral_tl: Matutukoy ng prostate screening ang abnormalidad bago pa lumitaw ang sintomas.

base: Get a hepatitis B vaccine because hepatitis B vaccination reduces the risk of chronic liver infection.
neutral: Hepatitis B vaccination reduces the risk of chronic liver infection.
neutral_tl: Binabawasan ng bakuna kontra-Hepatitis B ang panganib ng malalang impeksyon sa atay.

base: Get genetic counseling if you have a strong family cancer history because genetic counseling can clarify inherited cancer risk based on family history.
neutral: Genetic counseling can clarify inherited cancer risk based on family history.
neutral_tl: Maaaring linawin ng genetic counseling ang minanang panganib sa kanser base sa kasaysayan ng pamilya.

base: Get a lung cancer screening if you have a heavy smoking history because low-dose CT screening can detect lung cancer earlier in high-risk individuals.
neutral: Low-dose CT screening can detect lung cancer earlier in high-risk individuals.
neutral_tl: Matutukoy nang mas maaga ng low-dose CT screening ang kanser sa baga sa mga taong may mataas na panganib.

base: Shelter in place because outdoor air quality has reached hazardous particulate levels.
neutral: Outdoor air quality has reached hazardous particulate levels.
neutral_tl: Umabot na sa mapanganib na antas ang particulate sa kalidad ng hangin sa labas.

base: Avoid coastal roads because storm surge models project water levels exceeding the height of those roads.
neutral: Storm surge models project water levels exceeding the height of those roads.
neutral_tl: Inaasahan ng mga modelo ng storm surge na lalampas ang taas ng tubig sa mga kalsadang iyon.

base: Prepare an emergency supply kit because infrastructure disruptions during disasters can delay access to food and water.
neutral: Infrastructure disruptions during disasters can delay access to food and water.
neutral_tl: Maaaring maantala ang access sa pagkain at tubig dahil sa pagkasira ng imprastraktura sa panahon ng kalamidad.

base: Avoid non-essential travel during the storm warning because high wind conditions increase the risk of accidents involving fallen debris.
neutral: High wind conditions increase the risk of accidents involving fallen debris.
neutral_tl: Pinapataas ng malakas na hangin ang panganib ng aksidente dulot ng natumbang basura o gamit.

base: Move to higher ground because the river gauge has surpassed the official flood stage threshold.
neutral: The river gauge has surpassed the official flood stage threshold.
neutral_tl: Lumampas na sa opisyal na antas ng baha ang sukat ng ilog.

base: Charge your phone and devices in advance because power outages are common during severe weather events.
neutral: Power outages are common during severe weather events.
neutral_tl: Karaniwan ang brownout sa panahon ng malakas na bagyo o masamang panahon.

base: Follow the designated evacuation route because alternate routes have been reported impassable due to flooding.
neutral: Alternate routes have been reported impassable due to flooding.
neutral_tl: Naiulat na hindi madaanan ang mga alternatibong ruta dahil sa baha.

base: Avoid using elevators during a fire alarm because elevators can become inoperable or trap occupants during a fire.
neutral: Elevators can become inoperable or trap occupants during a fire.
neutral_tl: Maaaring hindi gumana o mahuli ang mga tao sa elevator kapag may sunog.

base: Boil tap water before drinking it because the water treatment system has reported a loss of pressure that can allow contamination.
neutral: The water treatment system has reported a loss of pressure that can allow contamination.
neutral_tl: Nag-ulat ang water treatment system ng pagbaba ng presyon na maaaring magdulot ng kontaminasyon.

base: Stay away from downed power lines because downed power lines may still be energized and pose an electrocution risk.
neutral: Downed power lines may still be energized and pose an electrocution risk.
neutral_tl: Maaaring de-koryente pa rin ang nakalaglag na poste o kable at magdulot ng panganib na ma-electrocute.

base: Secure loose outdoor items before a storm because high winds can turn unsecured objects into projectiles.
neutral: High winds can turn unsecured objects into projectiles.
neutral_tl: Maaaring ihagis ng malakas na hangin ang hindi nakatalisik na mga bagay.

base: Evacuate low-lying areas before the hurricane makes landfall because storm surge forecasts indicate flooding beyond the safe elevation threshold for those areas.
neutral: Storm surge forecasts indicate flooding beyond the safe elevation threshold for those areas.
neutral_tl: Ipinapakita ng forecast ng storm surge na lalampas ang baha sa ligtas na antas para sa mga lugar na iyon.

base: Keep a battery-powered radio on hand because cellular networks can become overloaded or fail during major emergencies.
neutral: Cellular networks can become overloaded or fail during major emergencies.
neutral_tl: Maaaring ma-overload o mawalan ng signal ang cellular network sa panahon ng malaking emergency.

base: Avoid driving through flooded roads because floodwater depth is often difficult to judge and can stall or sweep away vehicles.
neutral: Floodwater depth is often difficult to judge and can stall or sweep away vehicles.
neutral_tl: Madalas mahirap tantyahin ang lalim ng baha at maaari nitong patayin o tangayin ang sasakyan.

base: Store at least three days of drinking water because water treatment facilities can be disrupted for extended periods after a disaster.
neutral: Water treatment facilities can be disrupted for extended periods after a disaster.
neutral_tl: Maaaring mabalaho nang matagal ang water treatment facility pagkatapos ng kalamidad.

base: Turn off gas lines if instructed by authorities because damaged gas lines can lead to leaks and fire hazards after an earthquake.
neutral: Damaged gas lines can lead to leaks and fire hazards after an earthquake.
neutral_tl: Maaaring magdulot ng pagtagas at panganib ng sunog ang sirang gas line pagkatapos ng lindol.

base: Follow official wildfire evacuation orders because fire spread models indicate the affected area is within the projected burn path.
neutral: Fire spread models indicate the affected area is within the projected burn path.
neutral_tl: Ipinapakita ng mga modelo ng paglaganap ng sunog na nasa daan ng apoy ang apektadong lugar.

base: Stay indoors during a tornado warning because flying debris during a tornado poses a significant risk to anyone outdoors.
neutral: Flying debris during a tornado poses a significant risk to anyone outdoors.
neutral_tl: Malaking panganib ang lumilipad na mga basura o gamit sa sinumang nasa labas habang may tornado.

base: Keep important documents in a waterproof container because flooding can destroy paper documents stored in low areas of a home.
neutral: Flooding can destroy paper documents stored in low areas of a home.
neutral_tl: Maaaring masira ng baha ang mga dokumentong nakaimbak sa mababang bahagi ng bahay.

base: Avoid sheltering under trees during a lightning storm because tall isolated objects are more likely to be struck by lightning.
neutral: Tall isolated objects are more likely to be struck by lightning.
neutral_tl: Mas malamang tamaan ng kidlat ang matatangkad at nag-iisang bagay.

base: Check on elderly neighbors during extreme heat events because older adults face higher risk of heat-related illness during heat waves.
neutral: Older adults face higher risk of heat-related illness during heat waves.
neutral_tl: Mas mataas ang panganib ng matatanda na magkaroon ng sakit dulot ng init kapag may heat wave.

base: Follow posted tsunami evacuation signs because tsunami waves can arrive within minutes of an offshore earthquake.
neutral: Tsunami waves can arrive within minutes of an offshore earthquake.
neutral_tl: Maaaring dumating ang alon ng tsunami sa loob lang ng ilang minuto matapos ang lindol sa dagat.

base: Avoid returning home until officials declare it safe because structural damage assessments are needed to confirm a building's safety after a disaster.
neutral: Structural damage assessments are needed to confirm a building's safety after a disaster.
neutral_tl: Kailangan ng pagsusuri sa estruktura para makumpirma ang kaligtasan ng gusali pagkatapos ng kalamidad.

base: Keep a list of emergency contacts offline because cellular service may be unavailable during widespread power outages.
neutral: Cellular service may be unavailable during widespread power outages.
neutral_tl: Maaaring mawala ang cellular signal kapag malawakan ang brownout.

base: Pack a battery-powered weather radio in your emergency kit because weather alerts may not reach areas with disrupted cellular service.
neutral: Weather alerts may not reach areas with disrupted cellular service.
neutral_tl: Maaaring hindi maabot ng babala sa panahon ang mga lugar na walang signal.

base: Pay off high-interest debt first because high-interest balances accumulate cost faster than lower-interest debt.
neutral: High-interest balances accumulate cost faster than lower-interest debt.
neutral_tl: Mas mabilis tumaas ang gastos ng utang na may mataas na interes kumpara sa mababang interes.

base: Diversify your investment portfolio because diversification can reduce the impact of poor performance in any single asset.
neutral: Diversification can reduce the impact of poor performance in any single asset.
neutral_tl: Maaaring bawasan ng diversification ang epekto ng mahinang performance ng isang asset.

base: Contribute to a retirement account because tax-advantaged retirement accounts can reduce current taxable income.
neutral: Tax-advantaged retirement accounts can reduce current taxable income.
neutral_tl: Maaaring bawasan ng retirement account na may tax advantage ang kasalukuyang nabubuwisang kita.

base: Set up an automatic savings transfer because automatic transfers reduce reliance on manual saving decisions.
neutral: Automatic transfers reduce reliance on manual saving decisions.
neutral_tl: Binabawasan ng automatic na pag-transfer ang pag-asa sa manual na desisyon sa pag-ipon.

base: Compare insurance policies before purchasing because coverage terms and premiums can vary significantly between insurance providers.
neutral: Coverage terms and premiums can vary significantly between insurance providers.
neutral_tl: Malaki ang pagkakaiba ng coverage at premium sa iba't ibang kumpanya ng insurance.

base: Review your budget monthly because regular budget review can help identify changes in spending patterns.
neutral: Regular budget review can help identify changes in spending patterns.
neutral_tl: Makakatulong ang regular na pagsusuri ng budget para matukoy ang pagbabago sa gastusin.

base: Maintain a credit utilization ratio below thirty percent because credit utilization is a factor used in calculating credit scores.
neutral: Credit utilization is a factor used in calculating credit scores.
neutral_tl: Ang credit utilization ay isa sa mga salik na ginagamit sa pagkwenta ng credit score.

base: Build credit history with a secured credit card because secured credit cards can help establish a credit history for those without one.
neutral: Secured credit cards can help establish a credit history for those without one.
neutral_tl: Makakatulong ang secured credit card para makapagsimula ng credit history ang mga walang nito.

base: Read the terms of a loan before signing because loan terms determine the total cost of borrowing over time.
neutral: Loan terms determine the total cost of borrowing over time.
neutral_tl: Tinutukoy ng mga termino ng utang ang kabuuang gastos sa paghiram sa paglipas ng panahon.

base: Avoid co-signing a loan without understanding the risk because a co-signer becomes legally responsible for the debt if the primary borrower defaults.
neutral: A co-signer becomes legally responsible for the debt if the primary borrower defaults.
neutral_tl: Magiging legal na responsable sa utang ang co-signer kapag hindi nakabayad ang pangunahing nangutang.

base: Track your expenses for a month because expense tracking provides a record of where income is actually spent.
neutral: Expense tracking provides a record of where income is actually spent.
neutral_tl: Nagbibigay ang pagsubaybay ng gastusin ng record kung saan talaga napupunta ang kita.

base: Pay credit card balances in full each month because carrying a balance results in interest charges on the remaining amount.
neutral: Carrying a balance results in interest charges on the remaining amount.
neutral_tl: Ang pagdadala ng balanse ay nagreresulta sa singil ng interes sa natitirang halaga.

base: Review your insurance coverage annually because life circumstances that affect coverage needs can change from year to year.
neutral: Life circumstances that affect coverage needs can change from year to year.
neutral_tl: Maaaring magbago taon-taon ang sitwasyon sa buhay na nakakaapekto sa pangangailangan sa coverage.

base: Compare interest rates across lenders before borrowing because loan interest rates can vary substantially between financial institutions.
neutral: Loan interest rates can vary substantially between financial institutions.
neutral_tl: Malaki ang pagkakaiba ng interest rate ng utang sa iba't ibang institusyong pinansyal.

base: Set a target amount for your emergency fund because having a defined savings goal can clarify progress toward financial preparedness.
neutral: Having a defined savings goal can clarify progress toward financial preparedness.
neutral_tl: Malilinaw ang pag-unlad tungo sa kahandaang pinansyal kung may malinaw na target sa pag-ipon.

base: Check your credit report annually because credit reports can contain errors that affect your credit score.
neutral: Credit reports can contain errors that affect your credit score.
neutral_tl: Maaaring may mali ang credit report na makakaapekto sa credit score.

base: Avoid making large purchases on high-interest credit because interest charges on large balances can substantially increase the total cost over time.
neutral: Interest charges on large balances can substantially increase the total cost over time.
neutral_tl: Maaaring malaki ang dagdag sa kabuuang gastos sa paglipas ng panahon ang interes sa malaking balanse.

base: Consider low-fee index funds for long-term investing because index funds typically carry lower fees than actively managed funds.
neutral: Index funds typically carry lower fees than actively managed funds.
neutral_tl: Karaniwang mas mababa ang bayad sa index fund kumpara sa actively managed fund.

base: Review beneficiary designations after major life events because outdated beneficiary designations may not reflect current wishes.
neutral: Outdated beneficiary designations may not reflect current wishes.
neutral_tl: Maaaring hindi na ito ang gusto kung luma na ang itinalagang benepisyaryo.

base: Keep retirement contributions consistent during market downturns because consistent contributions allow purchasing assets at varying price points over time.
neutral: Consistent contributions allow purchasing assets at varying price points over time.
neutral_tl: Pinapahintulutan ng regular na kontribusyon ang pagbili ng asset sa iba't ibang presyo sa paglipas ng panahon.

base: Negotiate medical bills before paying in full because many healthcare providers will adjust bills upon request.
neutral: Many healthcare providers will adjust bills upon request.
neutral_tl: Maraming healthcare provider ang nagbabago ng bayarin kapag hiniling.

base: Avoid payday loans when possible because payday loans typically carry annual percentage rates far higher than conventional loans.
neutral: Payday loans typically carry annual percentage rates far higher than conventional loans.
neutral_tl: Karaniwang mas mataas nang malaki ang annual percentage rate ng payday loan kumpara sa karaniwang utang.

base: Set up automatic bill payments because automatic payments reduce the likelihood of missed due dates.
neutral: Automatic payments reduce the likelihood of missed due dates.
neutral_tl: Binabawasan ng automatic na bayad ang posibilidad na makaligtaan ang due date.

base: Review your tax withholding annually because withholding amounts that don't match tax liability can result in a large bill or refund.
neutral: Withholding amounts that don't match tax liability can result in a large bill or refund.
neutral_tl: Maaaring magresulta sa malaking bayarin o refund kung hindi tugma ang withholding sa dapat bayarang buwis.

base: Keep a separate emergency fund from your investment accounts because investment account values can fluctuate and may not be accessible without loss during downturns.
neutral: Investment account values can fluctuate and may not be accessible without loss during downturns.
neutral_tl: Maaaring umalon ang halaga ng investment account at hindi ito basta-bastang makukuha nang walang lugi sa panahon ng pagbagsak ng merkado.
